title: Solar on car parks and electric vehicle charging
snippet: We're seeking views on a proposal to mandate the installation of solar canopies on new outdoor car parks, subject to certain exemptions, as well as views around current planning policy relating to EV charging infrastruct…
ai_summary: DESNZ consultation on solar canopy mandates and EV charging policy could influence commercial property development and on-site generation requirements for tem's I&C customer base.
ai_reasoning: This is a formal government consultation that may impact planning and incentives for distributed generation (solar) on commercial sites—relevant to tem's generator and customer acquisition strategy. Not urgent, but worth monitoring for how it shapes future I&C PPA demand.
